title: Spoopy Update
description: ah, Minecraft. beatiful, but what if you could convert that into something, SPOOOOOOKY?!
body:
![The Banner of the Project](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a66b13cc9b018ae0620fabedca39a3dbf532da9.png)

## Hello Traveler!
Maybe you feel like me, zombies have great potential, but so unused. yes, we have 3 variants and zombies are the most common enemy in the game; but you can so much more than that!

So what I did is create this mod wich aims to bring some spooky stuff and mainly zombie variations! **Introducing:**

### The Spoopy Update!
*(Some call it the spooky update, but that sounds to similar to what mojang did)*

Adding new zombies, Biomes, Dimensions, Blocks and much more!
Consider joining the discord at the bottom of the page, Thank you and enjoy!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/yfS7otkp5dk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<details>
<summary>List of Content Added</summary>

- New Material: Spoostone (Ores and items)
- New Wood Type: Spooky Wood
- New Pumpkin Type: Ghoul Pumpkin
- New Spooky Dimension
- New Armor: Spoostone Armor
- New Armor: Spoogot Armor (Upgraded Spoostone Armor)
- 2 New Spooky Biomes
- 2 New Spooky Structures
- 7 New Zombie Variants
- 2 New Skeleton Variants
- 1 New Boss
- 1 New Music Disk
- 1 New painting
- A completly New Zombie Curing Mechanic
  
</details>


<details>
<summary>Planned in the Future</summary>

MOD IS FINISHED!!! NOTHING PLANNED IN THE FUTURE

</details>



<details>
<summary>Known Errors</summary>

Modrinth thinks this is available for 1.21, it isnt, its only available for 1.20.6 and neoforge

</details>
